devdoc.details: Manages the liquidity pool for the Online Banking System   - Holds USDC as liquidity for user deposits   - Owner can fund/withdraw to manage reserves   - SavingCore calls depositToVault/withdrawFromVault   - Pausable for emergency stops   - ReentrancyGuard on all external transfers

EnforcedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is paused.

ExpectedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is not paused.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC-20 token failed.

Paused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`.

Unpaused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`.

depositToVault(uint256).details: Called by SavingCore when a user opens a deposit      Records the deposit and accepts USDC transfer

fund(uint256).details: Owner deposits USDC into vault as liquidity reserve

getAvailableLiquidity().details: Available liquidity = actual balance - tracked deposits - owed interest      This is the "free" USDC owner funded but not yet committed to deposits/interest

isSolvent().details: Vault is solvent if actual balance >= total tracked deposits + owed interest

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

recordInterestOwed(uint256).details: Called by SavingCore when a deposit is opened      Records the expected interest obligation

releaseInterestOwed(uint256).details: Called by SavingCore when a deposit is settled (withdrawn, renewed, etc.)      Releases the interest obligation

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

vaultBalance().details: Actual USDC balance held by this contract

withdrawFromVault(address,uint256).details: Called by SavingCore when a user withdraws principal      Transfers USDC back to the user and reduces tracked deposits

withdrawInterest(address,uint256).details: Called by SavingCore to pay interest from vault reserves      Does NOT reduce totalDeposits (interest comes from owner-funded liquidity)

devdoc.title: VaultManager
